purpose: Convert outfit reference images into clean headless and handless female T-pose modular outfit renders for AI-to-3D workflows.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative female T-pose body, limb length, width, cutoff, and framing template.

front.label: Female Outfit Front
front.description: Front-facing technical modular outfit render on the locked female silhouette.

back.label: Female Outfit Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same modular outfit from the approved front view.

preserve: large readable belts, panels, cuffs, collars, boots, and armor plates
tasteful broad ornament when it defines the outfit
